rationale: Gov't Code §2306.078 concerns reporting requirements for disability-accessible housing units. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The department shall establish a system that requires owners of state or federally assisted housing developments with 20 or more housing units to report information regarding housing units designed for persons with disabilities.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and this disability housing information statute.
